unit.note: full client Vitest suite (190 files); server unchanged (client-only terminal change)

surface_verification.runner: playwright (chromium) vs isolated single-process Hono serving the built SPA + API (temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1:3947)
surface_verification.justification: Real-browser proof against a live pty: an OSC 52 clipboard-write escape written to the real xterm parser lands the decoded text on the OS clipboard (AC-1), and an OSC 52 READ request (52;c;?) leaves the clipboard untouched — deny, no leak (AC-2). Paste is intact (Ctrl+V multi-line CR-normalized, Shift+Insert) and Ctrl+C now passes through as SIGINT (AC-4/AC-5). Ran green (5/5). Note: localhost is a secure context so the copy takes the navigator.clipboard fast path; the execCommand fallback + its focus-preservation (the http/Tailscale path, review HIGH fix) is unit-covered (lib/clipboard.test.ts) and the mechanism was validated live via the user's console instrumentation over real http/Tailscale.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: an OSC 52 clipboard WRITE emitted by the terminal is decoded + written to the OS clipboard (execCommand fallback, http-safe)
behaviors.evidence: terminal-osc52.test.ts (write relays to copy; UTF-8 decode) + e2e terminal-osc52.spec.ts 'write lands on the OS clipboard' green

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: an OSC 52 READ request (52;c;?) is DENIED — consumed, no reply, clipboard untouched (no leak)
behaviors.evidence: terminal-osc52.test.ts (read -> no copy, returns true; parseOsc52 classifies ?, c;?, bare ?) + e2e 'read request does NOT alter the clipboard' green

behaviors.behavior: AC-3: malformed / empty / oversized OSC 52 payloads swallowed safely (no parser throw, no clobber, size pre-check)
behaviors.evidence: terminal-osc52.test.ts (invalid base64 -> null not throw; empty -> no copy; oversized -> invalid via pre-check before decode)

behaviors.behavior: AC-4: WebUI no longer intercepts Ctrl+C / Ctrl+Insert (pass through as interrupt/SIGINT); copy-on-selection, redraw cache, Copy pill, mouse-mode hint removed
behaviors.evidence: terminal-clipboard.test.ts (Ctrl+C -> passthrough) + terminal-clipboard-handler.test.ts (passthrough block) + EmbeddedTerminal.test.tsx (Ctrl+C passes through) + e2e terminal-copy-paste.spec.ts (Ctrl+C -> SIGINT); deleted useTerminalSelection + tests; full suite green

behaviors.behavior: AC-5: paste (Ctrl+V / Shift+Insert / right-click) + clipboard-notice (paste-hint/paste-failed/copy-failed) intact
behaviors.evidence: terminal-clipboard-handler.test.ts (paste block) + e2e terminal-copy-paste.spec.ts (Ctrl+V multiline, Shift+Insert) + useTerminalClipboard.test.ts (notice)

behaviors.behavior: AC-6: terminal Appearance setting (FR-01.44) unaffected by removing the copy-on-selection toggle
Review HIGH: async OSC 52 relay does not steal terminal keyboard focus on the http/execCommand path
behaviors.evidence: lib/clipboard.test.ts 'preserveFocus restores the previously-focused element' + 'without preserveFocus, focus is NOT restored' (opt-in guard for menu callers)
